videos.description: Jalen Brunson pulls up from the baseline and knocks down the jumper for the Knicks.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Brunson sinks jumper from the baseline) 2025/12/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Brunson sinks jumper from the baseline

videos.description: Brandon Ingram muscles his way to the rack for a tough and-1 for Toronto.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Ingram rattles in and-1 for the Raptors) 2025/12/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ingram rattles in and-1 for the Raptors

videos.description: Scottie Barnes drives along the baseline for a two-handed dunk for the Raptors.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Scottie Barnes throws it down for Toronto) 2025/12/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Scottie Barnes throws it down for Toronto

videos.description: Karl-Anthony Towns drives between two defenders and drops in a smooth layup for New York.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Towns splits the double team for a Knicks layup) 2025/12/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Towns splits the double team for a Knicks layup

videos.description: Karl-Anthony Towns gets to the rack for an explosive jam for the Knicks in the second quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Towns amped up after a massive jam for New York) 2025/12/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Towns amped up after a massive jam for New York

videos.description: Jordan Clarkson cashes in on a short jumper to extend the Knicks' lead in the first half.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Clarkson's jumper keeps Knicks rolling in 1st half) 2025/12/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Clarkson's jumper keeps Knicks rolling in 1st half

videos.description: Jalen Brunson pulls up from the wing and sinks the 3-pointer for the Knicks.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Brunson eases in a 3-pointer for the Knicks) 2025/12/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Brunson eases in a 3-pointer for the Knicks

videos.description: Brandon Ingram passes ahead to Ja'Kobe Walter, who throws down a two-handed dunk for Toronto.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Ingram finds Walter for a Raptors flush) 2025/12/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ingram finds Walter for a Raptors flush

videos.description: Jalen Brunson torches the Raptors with 35 points as the Knicks win 117-101 to advance to the semifinals of the NBA Cup.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NBA Highlight (Brunson's big night lifts Knicks to semifinals of NBA Cup) 2025/12/10 ESHEET SOTFULL

videos.headline: Brunson's big night lifts Knicks to semifinals of NBA Cup
